member.summary: 单元测试基类

member.summary: Autofac 容器

member.summary: 配置对象

member.summary: 构造函数

member.summary: 初始化配置和 DI 容器

member.summary: 注册服务（子类可重写添加测试所需的服务注册）

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.BaseUnitTest.GetService``1
member.summary: 从 DI 容器获取服务

member.summary: 清理资源

member.summary: 将 IContainer 适配为 IServiceProvider

member.name: T:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.AssemblyServiceTests
member.summary: 程序集服务单元测试

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.AssemblyServiceTests.AssemblyServiceResolveSucceed
member.summary: 通过 DI 获取 AssemblyService 实例

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.AssemblyServiceTests.GetAssemblyWithExistingNameReturnsAssembly
member.summary: 加载已存在的程序集应返回非空结果

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.AssemblyServiceTests.GetAssemblyWithNonExistentNameReturnsNull
member.summary: 加载不存在的程序集应返回 null（不抛异常）

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.AssemblyServiceTests.GetAssemblyListReturnsAssemblies
member.summary: 获取程序集列表应返回非空集合

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.AssemblyServiceTests.GetAssemblyListByIBaseAutofacReturnsFilteredAssemblies
member.summary: 按类型筛选程序集，应返回包含 IBaseAutofac 实现的程序集

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.AssemblyServiceTests.GetAssemblyListByNullTypeReturnsAllAssemblies
member.summary: 传入 null 类型过滤，应返回完整的程序集列表

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.AssemblyServiceTests.CheckIsAssignableFromAssemblyHasIBaseAutofacReturnsTrue
member.summary: 检查程序集是否包含指定类型的子类，应返回 true

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.AssemblyServiceTests.CheckIsAssignableFromNullAssemblyReturnsFalse
member.summary: 传入 null 程序集应返回 false，不抛异常

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.AssemblyServiceTests.CheckIsAssignableFromNoMatchTypeReturnsFalse
member.summary: 检查不包含指定类型的程序集应返回 false

member.name: T:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.DocumentServiceTests
member.summary: 文档服务单元测试

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.DocumentServiceTests.GetXmlDocumentFileListReturnsNonEmptyList
member.summary: 获取 XML 文档文件列表应返回非空集合

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.DocumentServiceTests.GetXmlDocumentFileListAllPathsEndWithXml
member.summary: 所有返回的文件路径应以 .xml 结尾

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.DocumentServiceTests.GetXmlDocumentFileListAllPathsAreAbsolute
member.summary: 所有返回的文件路径应为绝对路径

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.DocumentServiceTests.GetXmlDocumentFileListMultipleCallsReturnsSameResult
member.summary: 多次调用应返回相同的结果（缓存机制）

member.name: T:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.LibraryServiceTests
member.summary: 编译库服务单元测试

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.LibraryServiceTests.GetCompileLibrarieNnameListReturnsNonEmptyList
member.summary: 获取编译库名称列表应返回非空集合

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.LibraryServiceTests.GetCompileLibrarieNnameListAllNamesAreValid
member.summary: 编译库名称不应为空或空白字符串

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.LibraryServiceTests.GetCompileLibrarieNnameListContainsKnownAssembly
member.summary: 编译库名称应包含当前项目的核心程序集

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.LibraryServiceTests.GetCompileLibrarieNnameListExcludesMicrosoft
member.summary: 不包含以 Microsoft 开头的系统库

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.LibraryServiceTests.GetCompileLibrarieNnameListExcludesSystem
member.summary: 不包含以 System 开头的系统库

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Assembly.LibraryServiceTests.GetCompileLibrarieNnameListMultipleCallsReturnsSameResult
member.summary: 多次调用应返回相同的结果（缓存机制）

member.summary: Base64 和 MD5 扩展方法单元测试

member.summary: 枚举扩展方法单元测试

member.name: T:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.ContractResultTests
member.summary: 契约结果模型单元测试

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.ContractResultTests.ContractResultDefaultSuccessIsFalse
member.summary: ContractResult 默认 Success 为 false

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.ContractResultTests.ContractResultDefaultCodeIsFail
member.summary: ContractResult 默认 Code 为 FAIL 的哈希值

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.ContractResultTests.ContractResultSetSuccessWorks
member.summary: 设置 Success 后能正确读取

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.ContractResultTests.ContractResultDefaultSerialNoIsNotEmpty
member.summary: ContractResult 的 SerialNo 默认不为空

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.ContractResultTests.ContractResultDefaultTimeStampIsPositive
member.summary: ContractResult 的 TimeStamp 大于 0

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.ContractResultTests.ContractResultDefaultMessageIsNotEmpty
member.summary: ContractResult 的 Message 默认不为空

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.ContractResultTests.ContractResultSerialNoIsUnique
member.summary: ContractResult 的 SerialNo 每次创建不同

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.ContractResultTests.ContractResultGenericInheritsFromBase
member.summary: ContractResult(T) 继承自 ContractResult

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.ContractResultTests.ContractResultGenericDataWorks
member.summary: ContractResult(T) 设置 Data 后能正确读取

member.name: T:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.FormatExtensionsTests
member.summary: 格式化扩展方法单元测试

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.FormatExtensionsTests.SafeFormat_FormatsCorrectly
member.summary: SafeFormat 正常格式化字符串

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.FormatExtensionsTests.SafeFormat_InsufficientArgsKeepsPlaceholder
member.summary: SafeFormat 参数个数不足时保留占位符

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.FormatExtensionsTests.SafeFormat_EmptyReturnsEmpty
member.summary: SafeFormat 空字符串返回原值

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.FormatExtensionsTests.SafeFormat_NullReturnsNull
member.summary: SafeFormat null 返回 null

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.FormatExtensionsTests.SafeFormat_NoPlaceholdersReturnsOriginal
member.summary: SafeFormat 无占位符返回原文

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.FormatExtensionsTests.SafeFormat_NullArgBecomesEmpty
member.summary: SafeFormat 参数数组中包含 null 时转为空字符串

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.FormatExtensionsTests.SafeFormat_MultiplePlaceholders
member.summary: SafeFormat 多占位符均正确替换

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.FormatExtensionsTests.SafeFormat_NoArgsReturnsOriginal
member.summary: SafeFormat 无参数时返回原文

member.name: T:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.MessageExtensionsTests
member.summary: 消息扩展方法单元测试

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.MessageExtensionsTests.GetData_FromMessageBodyObject_ReturnsData
member.summary: GetData 从 MessageBody(object) 中提取 JSON 字符串数据

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.MessageExtensionsTests.GetData_FromMessageBodyGeneric_ReturnsData
member.summary: GetData 从 MessageBody(T) 中提取数据

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.MessageExtensionsTests.GetData_NullDataReturnsNull
member.summary: GetData Data 为 null 时返回 null

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.MessageExtensionsTests.GetData_FromMessageBodyObjectNullData_ReturnsNull
member.summary: GetData Data 为 null 时返回 null（MessageBody(object) 类型）

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.MessageExtensionsTests.GetDataAsync_ReturnsData
member.summary: GetDataAsync 异步获取数据

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.MessageExtensionsTests.GetData_InvalidType_ThrowsException
member.summary: GetData 非 MessageBody(object) 或 MessageBody(T) 时抛异常

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.MessageExtensionsTests.MessageBody_PropertiesSetCorrectly
member.summary: MessageBody 属性赋值正确

member.summary: PageDataResult 计算分页属性

member.summary: PageDataResult HasNext 和 HasPrevious 边界值

member.summary: PageParam 默认 PageSize 为 20

member.summary: PageParam NextId 默认 null

member.summary: SetSuceccful 后 Success 为 true

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.ResultExtensionsTests.SetSuceccful_CodeIsSuccess
member.summary: SetSuceccful 后 Code 为 SUCCESS 的哈希值

member.summary: SetSuceccful 后 Message 为"成功"

member.summary: SetSuceccful 带流水号参数

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.ResultExtensionsTests.SetSuceccful_WithFormatArgs
member.summary: SetSuceccful 带格式化参数

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.ResultExtensionsTests.SetSuceccfulGeneric_DataWorks
member.summary: SetSuceccful(T) 后 Data 正确

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.ResultExtensionsTests.SetError_SuccessIsFalse
member.summary: SetError 后 Success 为 false

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.ResultExtensionsTests.SetError_CodeMatches
member.summary: SetError 后 Code 为对应错误码的哈希值

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.ResultExtensionsTests.SetError_MessageMatches
member.summary: SetError 后 Message 为错误描述的枚举描述

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.ResultExtensionsTests.SetError_WithSerialNo
member.summary: SetError 带流水号后 SerialNo 正确

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.ResultExtensionsTests.IsSuceccful_ReturnsCorrectStatus
member.summary: IsSuceccful 返回 Success 的值

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.ResultExtensionsTests.IsSuceccful_NullReturnsFalse
member.summary: IsSuceccful 对 null 返回 false

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.ResultExtensionsTests.SetErrorGeneric_Works
member.summary: SetError 泛型后 Success 为 false 且 Data 为 default

member.name: T:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.SnowflakeServiceTests
member.summary: 雪花算法服务单元测试

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.SnowflakeServiceTests.GetSerialNo_ReturnsNotEmpty
member.summary: GetSerialNo 返回不为空

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.SnowflakeServiceTests.GetSerialNo_LengthIs28
member.summary: GetSerialNo 返回 28 位长度（yyMMddHHmmssffff + 3位机器码 + 9位序号）

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.SnowflakeServiceTests.GetSerialNo_IsUnique
member.summary: 多次获取流水号不重复

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.SnowflakeServiceTests.GetVersionNo_IsPositive
member.summary: GetVersionNo 返回大于 0

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.SnowflakeServiceTests.GetVersionNo_IsUnique
member.summary: 多次获取版本号不重复

member.name: M:Com.GleekFramework.UnitTest.Tests.Contract.SnowflakeServiceTests.GetSerialNo_StartsWithDate
member.summary: 流水号以日期开头
